_comment: Fill in for your specific meeting. Run: python ../../scripts/meeting_prep_briefer.py meeting_input.json
your_role: Account exec leading the renewal conversation
primary_goal: Secure verbal commitment to renew at expanded scope (+$80K ARR)

attendees.name: Jane Wu
attendees.position_on_topic: Champion — wants the renewal to happen but is budget-constrained

attendees.name: Tom Reyes
attendees.position_on_topic: Skeptical — has questioned ROI in two prior reviews

decisions_sought: Verbal commitment to expanded scope by end of meeting
Confirmation of decision-maker for final signoff
questions_to_ask: What changed between Q1 plan and current plan that affects budget?
Are there competing priorities competing for the same budget line this quarter?
Who else needs to be in the loop before final signoff?
talking_points: ROI tracker shows $312k value delivered in last 12 months — published in shared dashboard
Expanded scope addresses the marketing team's request from March QBR
Pricing held flat despite our list-price increase — grandfathering ends at renewal

counter_arguments_to_anticipate.argument: We need to defer until Q3 budget cycle
counter_arguments_to_anticipate.response: Grandfathered pricing expires at current term end; deferring loses ~$12k vs renewing now

counter_arguments_to_anticipate.argument: We don't have headcount to use the expanded scope yet
counter_arguments_to_anticipate.response: The expanded scope includes white-glove onboarding for 90 days — net headcount cost is zero

context: Account renewing in 6 weeks. Strong product engagement; weak budget environment for the customer's parent company. Champion is in the room but CFO has been the blocker before.
last_meeting_notes: Q1 review: Jane committed to socialize expanded scope internally. Tom raised concerns about per-seat cost; we agreed to revisit at this meeting with usage data.
success_definition: Verbal commitment to renew at expanded scope; clear path through procurement; no new objections raised that we don't have answers for.
fallback_position: Renewal at current scope, with expanded scope deferred to mid-term mini-amendment in 90 days.
